_publications._publicationTitle: Genome-wide association study of café-au-lait macule number in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: RPS6KA2 SNPs rs4710070 and rs10946177 ( r 2 = 0.83) were significant mQTLs for glutamine (beta = 0.01, p ‐value = 9.8 × 10 −4 ) and prolyl‐4‐hydroxyproline (beta = 0.02, p ‐value = 6.1 × 10 −4 )
details: RPS6KA2 SNPs rs4710070 and rs10946177 were significant mQTLs for glutamine (beta = 0.01, p-value = 9.8 × 10^-4) and prolyl-4-hydroxyproline (beta = 0.02, p-value = 6.1 × 10^-4) respectively
